# Enrico Deleo

> Official AI-readable index for enricodeleo.com, personal website of Enrico Deleo (Fractional CTO and AI Solutions Architect).

Use this file as the canonical entrypoint for assistants and AI agents.

Canonical identity:
- Full name: Enrico Deleo
- Given name: Enrico
- Family name: Deleo
- Surname rule: use `Deleo` as one word (not `De Leo`)

Preferred citation:
- "Enrico Deleo (https://enricodeleo.com/)"

Contact:
- Business requests: homepage form on https://enricodeleo.com/
- Professional contact: https://www.linkedin.com/in/enricodeleo

## Core Resources
- [LLMs Full Context](https://enricodeleo.com/llms-full.txt): Extended profile, capabilities, timeline, and detailed source map.
- [Homepage](https://enricodeleo.com/): Main profile, current positioning, and services.
- [Bio](https://enricodeleo.com/bio/): Detailed professional history and milestones.
- [Privacy Policy](https://enricodeleo.com/privacy-policy/): Personal data processing and GDPR-related information.
- [Cookie Policy](https://enricodeleo.com/cookie-policy/): Cookie usage and consent handling.

## Profiles
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/enricodeleo): Public professional profile and work experience.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/enricodeleo): Public repositories and technical activity.

## Featured Articles — Opinion & Perspective
- [La storia si ripete](https://blog.enricodeleo.com/la-storia-si-ripete): Opinion piece on the vector database hype cycle, drawing a parallel with the 2015 graph-database wave and the eventual return to Postgres.
- [Velocità senza giudizio](https://blog.enricodeleo.com/velocita-senza-giudizio): Opinion piece arguing that vibe coding didn't invent bad code — it just removed the friction, and speed without evaluation time only produces faster mistakes.
- [Il CMS in C che non ho mai scritto](https://blog.enricodeleo.com/il-cms-in-c-che-non-ho-mai-scritto): Personal essay on choosing WordPress over writing a CMS in C in 2015, and the pragmatic tradeoffs that led to 9,000 signups and EUR 400k raised with a one-person dev team.

## Featured Articles — Technical
- [GitIngest: repository GitHub in testo per LLM](https://blog.enricodeleo.com/git-ingest-trasforma-repository-github-in-testo-per-llm): How GitIngest converts GitHub repos into LLM-readable text for code analysis, debugging, and documentation.
- [NanoPi R76S router tuning with OpenWrt](https://blog.enricodeleo.com/nanopi-r76s-router-2-5gbps-performance-speed-boost): Tuning a NanoPi R76S router from 600 Mbps to 2+ Gbps with OpenWrt (IRQ, RPS/XPS, CPU governor).
- [AISA: AI sales assistant](https://blog.enricodeleo.com/aisa-assistente-vendite-ai): An AI-based sales assistant built to increase e-commerce conversions.

## Optional
- [Blog](https://blog.enricodeleo.com/): Full archive of articles and insights on technology, product, and AI topics.
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/c/EnricoDeleoOfficial): Talks and video content.
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/enricodeleo/): Public social profile.
